Title: xFrontend — pageContext Homepage Slug Resolution
Preconditions: Runner-native. Calls pageContext with storeId + empty permalink. Expects store metadata populated. No auth required.
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=homepage_ctx] errors[] empty
[DATA label=homepage_ctx] data.pageContext is non-null
[DATA label=homepage_ctx] data.pageContext.store is non-null
[DATA label=homepage_ctx] data.pageContext.store.storeId is non-null
Cross_Layer_Checks: [ROUNDTRIP label=homepage_ctx] re-execute → same store metadata returned
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty; store null; storeId mismatch

Title: xFrontend — pageContext CMS Permalink Resolution
Preconditions: Runner-native. Calls pageContext with a sample permalink. Verifies slugInfo structure is present.
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=search_ctx] errors[] empty
[DATA label=search_ctx] data.pageContext is non-null
[DATA label=search_ctx] data.pageContext.slugInfo is non-null
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] slugInfo.entityInfo may be populated if /search resolves to a known entity, or null if permalink is a pure route. Both acceptable.

Title: xFrontend — pageContext Store Settings in Response
Preconditions: Runner-native. Queries pageContext and asserts store.defaultLanguage + store.defaultCurrency + store.availableLanguages/Currencies are populated.
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=store_settings] errors[] empty
[DATA label=store_settings] data.pageContext.store is non-null
[DATA label=store_settings] data.pageContext.store.defaultLanguage is non-null
[DATA label=store_settings] data.pageContext.store.defaultCurrency is non-null
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] defaultLanguage.cultureName and defaultCurrency.code populated; availableLanguages/Currencies are non-empty lists
Failure_Signals: Schema drift on StoreResponseType (DV-009); defaultLanguage/Currency null

Title: xFrontend — pageContext Authenticated vs Anonymous User Context
Preconditions: Runner-native. Calls pageContext twice — first anonymous, then authenticated. Verifies user resolution differs.
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=anon_ctx] errors[] empty
[ERRORS label=auth_ctx] errors[] empty
[DATA label=auth_ctx] data.pageContext.user is non-null
[DATA label=auth_ctx] data.pageContext.user.id is non-null
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] auth_ctx.user.id is a real GUID matching ORG_USER. anon_ctx.user.id differs (anonymous id or null).
Failure_Signals: auth_ctx returns null user; anon_ctx leaks authenticated data

Title: xFrontend — pageContext Invalid Permalink
Preconditions: Runner-native. Calls pageContext with a permalink that doesn't exist. Expects slugInfo.entityInfo=null without HTTP 500.
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=bogus_ctx] errors[] empty
[DATA label=bogus_ctx] data.pageContext is non-null
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] Invalid permalink → entityInfo null + store still populated. No HTTP 500 or stack trace.
Failure_Signals: HTTP 500; crash; stack trace in errors[]; entityInfo populated with arbitrary data

Title: xFrontend — pageContext Organization-Scoped White Labeling
Preconditions: Runner-native. ORG_USER queries pageContext with their organizationId. Verifies whiteLabelingSettings schema resolves (value may be null if org has no WL config).
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=wl_ctx] errors[] empty
[DATA label=wl_ctx] data.pageContext is non-null
[DATA label=wl_ctx] data.pageContext.store is non-null
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] whiteLabelingSettings may be null (org has no WL config) or populated with fields. Either is acceptable for schema-coverage.
